name: agent-brain-evals
description: Eval harness for brain-repo agents. Run via: cd evals && npm install && npm run eval:<agent>. Promptfoo CLI is the runner; LLM-as-judge uses MODEL_EVAL (claude-opus-4-7).

scripts.eval:all: ok=0; npm run eval:ceo || ok=1; npm run eval:base-manager || ok=1; npm run eval:base-worker || ok=1; exit $ok
